creator: seschwar@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 186747
afew-1.2.0.diff

The attached patch adds the port for https://github.com/afewmail/afew, a script for tagging new mail using mail/notmuch.

I've tested the port under FreeBSD 11.1-REALEASE on amd64 using the following utilities:

- portlint -AC
- make package
- poudriere testport

The output of each of them is clean.

This port depends on devel/py-subprocess32 (#222628).
